hero.subhead: HAVS helps manufacturers in CLT, glulam, facades, roofing and flooring gain access to relevant contractors, tender material and decision-makers in the construction industry.

what_we_do.heading: Access to projects, relationships and decision-makers
what_we_do.body: HAVS works at the intersection of manufacturers, contractors and architects. We identify relevant construction projects, obtain tender material and create connections between the right people.

services.heading: What we do
services.projektidentifikation_body: We maintain ongoing dialogue with contractors about upcoming and active construction projects.
services.tilbudsmateriale_body: We obtain and pass on relevant project and tender material to manufacturers.
services.introduktioner_body: We create connections between manufacturers, contractors, architects and other relevant decision-makers.
services.moedebooking_body: We arrange meetings between manufacturers and architects when there is a relevant match.
services.projektopfoelgning_body: HAVS tracks ongoing project developments to ensure manufacturers stay relevant throughout the process.

segments.heading: Product areas
segments.clt_body: Cross-laminated timber for load-bearing structures and floor elements.
segments.glulam_body: Glued laminated timber for trusses, columns and exposed structures.
segments.tag_body: Prefabricated and traditional timber-based roof structures.
segments.gulve_body: Timber floors and flooring systems for commercial and residential use.
segments.special_body: Timber-based building materials and specialist products for the construction industry.

why_havs.heading: Why HAVS
why_havs.reason3: Strong relationships in the construction industry
why_havs.reason4: Focus on relevant opportunities rather than cold leads

process.heading: How we work
process.step1_body: We clarify which projects, segments and players are relevant for the manufacturer.
process.step2_body: HAVS identifies relevant projects and maintains dialogue with contractors and market players.
process.step3_body: Relevant tender material and introductions are passed on to the manufacturer.
process.step4_body: Where needed, meetings are arranged with architects, contractors or other decision-makers.

partners.heading: Working with the Nordic timber industry.
partners.body: HAVS works with partners across the Nordic construction industry, including manufacturers of timber-based and other sustainable building materials.

about_snippet.heading: Relationships build projects
about_snippet.body: HAVS was established to create stronger connections between manufacturers and decision-makers in the construction industry. We work relationally, commercially and close to the market — with a focus on access, timing and relevant projects.

contact_band.heading: Let's have a conversation
contact_band.body: Contact HAVS if you want access to relevant projects, contractors and relationships in the construction industry.

contact_page.heading: Let's have a conversation.
contact_page.success: Thank you — David will be in touch shortly.
contact_page.error_generic: Something went wrong. Try again or write directly to david@havs.dk.
